title: Darshan
overview: Rahul(Darshan)poses as a software engineer and meets Ramamurthy’s family and stays with them.They killed his parents. Nandini (Navneeth), Ramamurthy’s daughter loves him. She comes to know that Rahul is a terrorist. This leads to his arrest.
